name: markdown-video-audio
displayName: Markdown Video Audio — play videos with sound in Markdown preview
description: Play MP4/MOV videos embedded in the VS Code Markdown preview with sound, by pairing the muted video with a sibling audio track around the webview's missing AAC codec (automatic ffmpeg extraction planned).

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Renders local MP4/MOV as a muted video paired with a sibling audio track, reading only local files already in the workspace. Automatic ffmpeg extraction (which will run only in trusted workspaces) is planned, not yet active. WebM plays with native audio.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Playback needs a real on-disk file path for the video and its sibling audio (and, once added, a local ffmpeg).

markdownVideoAudio.enabled.description: Enable audio playback for videos in the Markdown preview.

markdownVideoAudio.ffmpegPath.description: Reserved (not yet active): path to the ffmpeg executable for automatic audio extraction. Empty = search PATH.

markdownVideoAudio.autoplay.description: Reserved (not yet active): autoplay videos when the preview opens (muted; audio resumes on first interaction).

markdownVideoAudio.maxSyncDriftMs.description: Reserved (not yet wired): target maximum drift between audio and video before correction (ms). Currently fixed at 250 ms.

markdownVideoAudio.cacheDirName.description: Reserved (not yet active): directory name for the extracted-audio cache, created under the workspace (must be inside localResourceRoots).

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run typecheck:webview && npm run build:preview
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run clean && npm run build
